Hemphill Street mixed-use contested authority review.
The corridor partnership requested action-request:hemphill-lane-closure-001 for a mixed-use construction window in corridor-zone:hemphill-mixed-use.
Neighborhood services logged incident:hemphill-conflicting-posting after conflicting authority notices appeared on the same block.
A legacy memorandum was presented as an active authority grant, but the city attorney liaison stated the memo was not an active grant.
The board deferred the action request and conditioned any future approval on a signed corridor operations grant.
Staff marked the legacy memo as phantom authority and revoked the temporary scheduling release tied to that memo.
Planning and legal then issued a corrected authority grant with operating conditions, resolving the contested authority path.
The decision record closed with a monitoring obligation that remained active for the first mixed-use work window.
